item.description: ### Changed - **Much better Codex support.** Perch now tracks every Codex session you have open — whether it's running in the ChatGPT desktop app or as `codex` in a terminal — instead of missing some or showing the wrong details. Each row is tagged **CLI** or **DESKTOP** so you can tell them apart at a glance, and clicking one takes you to the right place: your terminal pane for a CLI session, or straight to the conversation in the Codex desktop app. Long-running and multi-session setups (several Codex windows, even in the same project) all show up correctly now.
